Comment: NACQ = NCOMM + GFFE (GFFE stored negative so it nets fronting fee INTO acquisition cost). Income Statement views this differently: fronting fee appears as revenue (REV_FFE), not in EXP_NACQ. Net Income reconciles to UWEX_UWINC algebraically.

Content: ={REF:Balance Sheet!BS_TOTAL_LE}-{REF:Balance Sheet!BS_AR}-{REF:Balance Sheet!BS_RI_RECV}-{REF:Balance Sheet!BS_CUPR}-{REF:Balance Sheet!BS_XOL_PREP}-{REF:Balance Sheet!BS_OTHER_A}
Comment: Balance-sheet residual (L+E minus other assets = cash + invested assets). NEGATIVE pool indicates undercapitalization -- model continues computing but results are not meaningful. If this cell shows negative, equity has been depleted below other asset levels. Watch for negative value as a sign of capital-adequacy risk. No automatic halt; user judgment required.

Net commission only (GCOMM + CEDCOMM). Fronting fee is NOT an expense here; it flows through Revenue Summary (REV_FFE) as fee income. Net Income reconciles to UWEX_UWINC because UWEX nets fronting into acq while IS separates it into revenue -- both paths algebraically equivalent.
